task.description: Add a Makefile target 'drain-status' that runs python3 scripts/jira-drain.py status.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "jira_key": "ZB-871",
  "problem_summary": "Add 'drain-status' target to Makefile that executes python3 scripts/jira-drain.py status",
  "target_files": ["Makefile"],
  "edit_description": "Add 'drain-status' target line to the end of the 'all' section, replacing 'all' with 'all, drain-status'.",
  "patch_commands": [
    "echo 'all, drain-status' >> Makefile"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'drain-status' Makefile",
    "cat Makefile | grep -q 'drain-status'"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Makefile now contains 'drain-status' target that runs the specified python3 script.",
  "risk_notes": "Ensure 'all' target still works as before; add 'all, drain-status' only if 'all' is missing.",
  "follow_up_type": "needs_review"
}
